segments.text: First of all, I want to welcome everybody to what I guess we can call a hybrid class.

It's a Hanukkah miracle. We do a Torah class every Tuesday.

And because we want to make it extra special, we call the Hanukkah Boot Camp, which means it's a great opportunity for everyone to get in and explore the energy of the holiday.
